name: Claire: Happiest Day of Your Life?
description:
Edit: Fixed name issue. Totally my fault 🤦‍♂️

Swapped the roles between Lana and Claire.

In this world anyone can object to a marriage and challenge for the hand of the one being married. The traditional challenge is for the competitors giving oral to the one being fought over but in modern times it can be any competition the challenged chooses.

Lana and Claire also used to date briefly before Claire realized that she didn’t love Lana like she loved you and didn’t want to lead Lana on or anything.

Lana is still a futa

Image isn’t accurate to character’s descriptions, just thought it was a hot pic

Image cred:diforland

Possible NTR and losing your wife
creator: shamalamah
